footer.brand_desc: Immerse yourself in a world of refined tastes and unparalleled oceanic flavors. Curating only the most exceptional catches for the true connoisseur.

home.hero_desc: Discover a refined selection of smoked salmon and gourmet products, carefully chosen for rich flavor, elegant presentation, and a premium experience at home.
home.specials_desc: Every week, we select special products with limited quantities and exclusive offers.
home.delivery_desc: We deliver to the majority of the metropolitan area with reliable local service and careful order handling. Check the map to see our main delivery zones.
home.delivery_notice_text: Some deliveries might take more time than usual, between 24 to 36 hours.

specials.smoked_salmon_desc: Selected smoked products available for a limited time.
specials.seafood_desc: Weekly offers on selected seafood products.
specials.dumplings_desc: Special weekly offers on selected dumplings and pelmeni.

categories.smoked_collection_desc: Explore our signature smoked selection, chosen for rich flavor, texture, and elegant presentation.
categories.seafood_desc: Selected seafood products to complete your table with premium taste and variety.
categories.dumplings_desc: Comforting dumplings and pelmeni selected for simple, satisfying meals.
categories.sweet_delight_desc: A refined sweet selection to complete your order with elegant treats.

categories.no_products: No products found in this category yet. Coming soon!

cart.empty_desc: Looks like you haven't added any of our premium selections to your cart yet.
cart.taxes_note: Taxes and additional shipping calculated at checkout.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.info_desc: Some deliveries might take more time because certain products require longer preparation.
delivery.cost_desc: Delivery fees will be calculated using the postal code in the delivery fee calculator.
delivery.confirmation: Every delivery will be confirmed with a phone call before arriving at your address.
delivery.zones_desc: We currently deliver to all major metropolitan areas. Check the map below to see if your area is covered.
delivery.calculator_desc: Enter your postal code to estimate the delivery fee for your area.
delivery.final_fee_note: Final delivery fees may vary depending on your location and order total.

about.title: Our Story
about.desc_1: Smoked Shop was created around one passion: premium smoked salmon and carefully selected smoked products.
about.desc_2: Inspired by refined recipes, our smoked selection is chosen for rich flavor, elegant presentation, and a gourmet experience at home.
about.val_1_desc: Our main focus is premium smoked salmon and carefully selected smoked products chosen for taste, texture, and presentation.
about.val_2_desc: Inspired by elegant recipes, every product is selected to bring a gourmet experience to your table.
about.val_3_desc: Every order is prepared with attention and delivered locally with confirmation before arrival.

contact.desc: Whether you have a question about our sourcing, need assistance with an order, or want to inquire about wholesale pricing, our dedicated team is ready to assist you.
contact.success_msg: Your message has been sent successfully. We will get back to you shortly.
